content:
Given the undirected dynamic graph with the edges:
[(0, 9, 1), (3, 7, 1), (0, 7, 4), (0, 5, 5), (5, 7, 5), (4, 5, 7), (3, 8, 8), (4, 8, 9), (3, 4, 10), (4, 9, 11), (1, 4, 13), (2, 7, 13), (0, 8, 15), (1, 2, 16), (4, 6, 16), (2, 9, 17), (2, 8, 19)],

We need to find the nodes linked with node 2 exactly at time 19.

First, we will scan each edge (u, v, t) and collect the other node whenever the time t matches the queried time AND one of the nodes matches the queried node:

* Edge (0, 9, 1) has node 0 and time 1. -> Add node 9.
* Edge (3, 7, 1) has node 3 and time 1. -> Add node 7.
* Edge (0, 7, 4) has node 0 and time 4. -> Add node 7.
* Edge (0, 5, 5) has node 0 and time 5. -> Add node 5.
* Edge (5, 7, 5) has node 5 and time 5. -> Add node 7.
* Edge (4, 5, 7) has node 4 and time 7. -> Add node 7.
* Edge (3, 8, 8) has node 3 and time 8. -> Add node 8.
* Edge (4, 8, 9) has node 4 and time 9. -> Add node 9.
* Edge (3, 4, 10) has node 3 and time 10. -> Add node 4.
* Edge (4, 9, 11) has node 4 and time 11. -> Add node 9.
* Edge (1, 4, 13) has node 1 and time 13. -> Add node 4.
* Edge (2, 7, 13) has node 2 and time 13. -> Add node 7.
* Edge (0, 8, 15) has node 0 and time 15. -> Add node 8.
* Edge (1, 2, 16) has node 1 and time 16. -> Add node 2.
* Edge (4, 6, 16) has node 4 and time 16. -> Add node 6.
* Edge (2, 9, 17) has node 2 and time 17. -> Add node 9.
* Edge (2, 8, 19) has node 2 and time 19. -> Add node 8.

Now we have collected all nodes that are linked with node 2 at time 19: [9, 7, 5, 4, 8, 2, 6, 9, 7, 4, 9, 11, 4, 6, 9, 7, 4, 8, 15, 2, 8, 19].

Answer: [9, 7, 5, 4, 8, 2, 6, 9, 7, 4, 9, 11, 4, 6, 9, 7, 4, 8, 15, 2, 8, 19]
